result.reasoning: From the tool call history, step 2 shows that due to network limitations, a BibTeX entry was generated for the PhilPapers article. The generated entry is "@misc{DURYWA,". The text between the opening curly brace and the first comma is "DURYWA". This matches the paper ID from step 1. The authoritative casing from the source text is all uppercase, so it is preserved as "DURYWA". Applied casing rule: preserved exact casing from source text.
